properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Softly and tenderly Jesus is calling, Calling for you and for me, See on the portals He’s waiting and watching, Watching for you and for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come home, come home, Ye who are wary, come home; Earnestly, tenderly, Jesus is calling, Calling, O sinner, come home!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Why should we tarry when Jesus is pleading, Pleading for you and for me? Why should we linger and head not His mercies, Mercies for you and for me?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Time is now fleeting, the moments are passing, Passing from you and from me; Shadows are gathering, death’s night is coming, Coming for you and for me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh! For the wonderful love He has promised, Promised for you and for me; Though we have sinned, He has mercy and pardon, Pardon for you and for me.
